== Notes for [[Item:Q114077|Q114077]] ==

His father was born about 1070 and son was born about 1110, so he was born about 1090, (estimates).

----


-http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SPANISH%20NOBILITY%20LATER%20MEDIEVAL.htm#FernandoGomezSoverosaB

'''FERNANDO Gómez''', son of GÓMEZ Núnez & his wife Elvira Pérez . The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "Fernan Gomez el Cautivo" as son of "El Conde D. Gomes de Sobrado" and father of "D. Vasco Fernandez"[2637]. “Comes Rodericus, Fernandus Petris Furtatus, Fernandus Captivus…” subscribed the charter dated Jun 1140 under which Afonso I King of Portugal donated property to Tarouca[2638].

'''m''' ---. The name of Fernando´s wife is not known.

Fernando & his wife had one child:
*1. VASCO Fernández . The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "Fernan Gomez el Cautivo" as son of "El Conde D. Gomes de Sobrado" and father of "D. Vasco Fernandez"[2639]. '''m''' TERESA Gonçales de Sousa, daughter of GONÇALO Mendes de Sousa & his second wife Dordia Egas de Riba Douro. The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "Condesa D. Elvira de Faya, D. Teresa Gonçalez" as the children of "D. Gonçalo Mendez de Sousa" and his second wife "D. Dordia Veegas", and in another passage records that "D. Vasco Fernandez" married "D. Teresa Gonçalez de Sousa"[2640]. ''Vasco & his wife had four children: ''

--------

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
